infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SolarSnap uses the camera to photograph the sky at your proposed panel location. The photo is analysed to detect shading from buildings and trees.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SolarSnap uses your GPS location to calculate the sun's position at your site and to confirm you are within your registered home assessment zone.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SolarSnap uses the accelerometer to measure the angle your phone is being held, which corresponds to the tilt of the proposed solar panel.

plugins.cameraPermission: SolarSnap needs camera access to photograph the sky for solar assessment.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SolarSnap uses your location to calculate the sun's position at your site and to confirm you are within your home assessment zone.
